The opening

Sealed by hand, opened with a touch

Every invitation arrives sealed in wax. Your guests press the seal and your day unfolds.

You are invitedAria & Lucaare getting married
Press the seal
How it works
01

Choose your design.

Browse our curated themes crafted by designers who understand weddings.

02

Make it yours.

Enter your names, date, venue, and RSVP details. Live preview. No design software, no learning curve.

03

Share with one link.

Your guests tap a link on their phone and your invitation opens instantly.

5.0  ·  Loved by 3,500+ couples across 15 countries
Your story

Deserves a beautiful beginning.
